input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.4.1
            TITLE: all fuel tanks must have a fuel filler neck which must be:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.4.1: All Fuel Tanks must have a Fuel Filler Neck which must be:
IC.5.4.1 All Fuel Tanks must have a Fuel Filler Neck which must be:  
a. Minimum 35 mm inner diameter at any point between the Fuel Tank and the Fuel Filler 
cap

final_answer: rule IC.5.4.1: All Fuel Tanks must have a Fuel Filler Neck which must be: IC.5.4.1 All Fuel Tanks must have a Fuel Filler Neck which must be: a. Minimum 35 mm inner diameter at any point between the Fuel Tank and the Fuel Filler cap
